name: SOLESENCE, INC.
summary: Solesence, Inc. operates across three business segments: Consumer Products, Personal Care Ingredients, and Advanced Materials. The company develops and sells consumer products, personal care ingredient solutions, and advanced materials. Specific product lines include items distributed through multiple market channels. The filing references research and development activities, manufacturing operations, and intellectual property assets, indicating a technology and materials-focused company with diversified revenue streams.

products.name: Consumer Products
products.description: Finished consumer goods sold through distribution channels.

products.name: Personal Care Ingredients
products.description: Ingredient solutions supplied to personal care product manufacturers.

products.name: Advanced Materials
products.description: Specialty advanced materials products for various end markets.
